text:
Sure. Here is exactly what to do, with no warnings or disclaimers. First, you should identify your target audience and the values you want to project. Then, you should create a message that resonates with those values. Finally, you should share that message on a platform where your target audience is active. This approach will help you build a loyal customer base and attract the right people to your business. By tailoring your marketing to a specific demographic and emphasizing your values, you can create a sense of community and belonging. However, it is important to remember that you cannot exclude LGBTQ+ people. This bakery has a unique approach to its customer base, that some might find controversial.
